examples: It was tough on the visitors because the goal stemmed from Ryan Lowe's miscue.
A gradual agricultural revolution in northern Europe stemmed from concerns over food supplies at a time of rising populations.
Our ship stemmed on against the current.
Before broadcasting began in 1924, musical entertainment in the home stemmed from self-playing musical instruments and automata.
That stemmed from a debt buyback offer that has the virtue of strengthening the balance sheet.
